features: Multifunction tissue paper:conveniently use these solid assorted tissue papers as crepe paper, gift wrappers, and kids art
20 Assorted colors：60 sheets tissue paper in total, approx 50cmx35cm/20x14inches in each sheet, assorted color bring variety atmosphere
Material: made of 17gsm paper, not easy to tear apart
Easy to use:Flexible, easy to fold, fit for different size gift packing
Widely use:Multi coloured tissue paper used for gift boxes, gift bags, gift baskets, wine bottle such as champagne, flower decoration, DIY crafts projects
description: Features: MIAHART multi coloured wrapping paper sheets made of 17gsm paper, not easy to tear apart, and also with high gloss, easy to flex, shape, fold, glue and manipulate.Each sheet of decorative crepe paper is 35cm x 50 cm/ 20 x 14 in , making them appropriate for floral art, craft, play-time with kids, and drawing projects. Wrapping paper used for all kinds of occasions like wedding, baby showers, birthday, anniversary celebration and DIY craft projects to enhance your festival atmosphere Size: approx 35 x 50 cm / 20 x 14 in Material: paper Color: multi color Package Includes: 60 x Tissue Paper Notice： Due to manual measurement may be dimension errors Due to different display reasons, the color may have errors Sheets will come folded to fit into a package
